I've already done them. Like, when I realized that we started going back to all of our sequences and rebuilding when someone comes in and they buy an offer, they come into it, they opt in, whatever it is, I'm using the exact same process I would do live through here. Then the actual webinar happens, which is where you would plug in your webinar or you'd do it live if you didn't go to the webinar.
